summary: Complete testing of CEIBAA Recruitment Portal module. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully including Recruiter login/dashboard, Admin login/dashboard, Jobs Feed, Discover Companies, Company Channel, and Student application flow.
critical_code_review_comments: recruitment_routes.py: All endpoints properly exclude password_hash from responses
recruitment_seed.py: Seed data correctly creates 5 companies, 6 posts, 1 admin on startup
server.py: Routes correctly registered at lines 275-279 with /api prefix
Frontend pages use proper data-testid attributes for testing
JWT auth properly shared between student/recruiter/admin with same JWT_SECRET
seed_data_creation: Seed runs on backend startup - creates 5 companies (TCS, Infosys, Google India, Flipkart, Razorpay), 6 posts (3 jobs, 1 quiz, 1 hackathon, 1 event), 1 admin, 8 students with AIR ranks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recruitment Portal fully tested. Key flows: 1) Recruiter login at /recruiter → dashboard at /recruiter/dashboard → create post at /recruiter/post. 2) Admin login at /recruitment-admin → dashboard with tabs (Dashboard/Recruiters/Moderation). 3) Jobs Feed at /jobs shows all 6 posts with filter tabs. 4) Discover Companies at /discover shows 5 companies with search/filter. 5) Company Channel at /company/{slug} shows company details with 6 tabs. 6) Student can apply at /apply/{jobId} after login. 7) My Applications at /my-applications shows student's applications.

frontend_ui_tests.recruiter_login_flow: PASS - Login with hr@tcs.com/tcs123 redirects to /recruiter/dashboard
frontend_ui_tests.recruiter_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats, posts, company info
frontend_ui_tests.recruiter_create_post: PASS - /recruiter/post shows all 4 post type options
frontend_ui_tests.recruiter_logout: PASS - Logout redirects to login page
frontend_ui_tests.admin_login_flow: PASS - Login with admin@ceibaa.in/admin123 shows dashboard
frontend_ui_tests.admin_recruiters_tab: PASS - Shows 5 recruiters with Add Recruiter button
frontend_ui_tests.jobs_feed_page: PASS - /jobs shows 6 posts with filter tabs
frontend_ui_tests.apply_job_page: PASS - /apply/{jobId} shows job details and Apply button

feature_verification.recruiter_auth: VERIFIED - Login, token storage in localStorage as 'recruiter_token', logout
feature_verification.admin_auth: VERIFIED - Login, token storage as 'admin_recruitment_token', logout
feature_verification.student_auth: VERIFIED - Uses existing Ceibaa auth (token stored as 'token')
feature_verification.companies_crud: VERIFIED - List, search, filter, get by slug
feature_verification.posts_crud: VERIFIED - List feed, filter by type, get by ID, company posts
feature_verification.admin_dashboard: VERIFIED - Global analytics, recruiters management, moderation
feature_verification.student_applications: VERIFIED - Apply to job, view my applications
